Volume One — MMXXVI
An ode to the road
A House of Living

Live without borders.

A modern house of living, distilled into four refined frameworks for the body, the mind, the income, and the road. Crafted on five continents — exported to those who refuse the default.

Discover the Systems
Jungfraujoch 46°N · 7°E · top of europe, switzerland
I—VI
TrainTravelEarnReadBuildMoveBegin TrainTravelEarnReadBuildMoveBegin
The Author

A life designed, not defaulted.

I built mine on three quiet pillars: iron, ocean, and code — and the freedom to live them anywhere.

These are the same systems I run: refined across five continents, road-tested in cities and on coastlines, then handed to those who refuse to wait.

Five years in motion. Forty-plus countries. One house of living, slowly built.

— Chapter Two —
